name: First /start registers the agent (idempotent on userId) and uses 'You're registered' copy

payload.text:
Welcome to HomeLeadBot, Test! 🏠

You're registered as an agent. I help you post listings, capture buyer leads, and deliver hot-lead notifications. Pick an option below to get started.

name: Second /start in the same dialog (same userId) recognises the returning agent and uses 'Welcome back' copy

payload.text:
Welcome to HomeLeadBot, Test! 🏠

You're registered as an agent. I help you post listings, capture buyer leads, and deliver hot-lead notifications. Pick an option below to get started.

Welcome back, Test! 🏠

I help you post listings, capture buyer leads, and deliver hot-lead notifications. Pick an option below to get started.
